title: Search updates when conducting searches
excerpt:
Hello! 
It would be great if when you conduct a search for something, items in the updates come up as ‘found’ on that search.  Is there a way to do this and I just don’t know how? 
Thanks a bunch!

posts.author: Terrie (Terrie Schwerin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
It would be great if when you conduct a search for something, items in the updates come up as ‘found’ on that search. Is there a way to do this and I just don’t know how?
Thanks a bunch!

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Terrie - can you expand on your use case? Are you using Search Everything and looking to pull items or updates?

posts.author: Terrie (Terrie Schwerin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
Yes, I am using the ‘search everything’ option and the items that we put in the ‘updates’ don’t come back as found
The ‘updates’ section where you can type notes for a pulse (row)
Hope that makes sense
Thanks!
Terrie

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Terrie - so sorry for taking so long to get back to you.

Could you email support@monday.com with some screenshot of this behavior and mention me to the team so I can take a look tomorrow with my tech team?

posts.author: colleencass (Colleen Cassingham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @bradley - it seems like Monday.com still doesn’t have the function to search updates. Is that true? Are there plans in the works to add the capacity to search updates in the cross-board search function? Super necessary… thanks!

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @colleencass we do have that option:

image934×390 23.6 KB

Let me know if you are referring to something else

posts.author: colleencass (Colleen Cassingham)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for pointing that out!! My bad

posts.author: TH1260 (Toby Hamblin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I cannot find the search Updates option on the mobile app. Does this exist? Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TH1260

Just to update you on this - the ‘Search Everything’ feature is now available on the mobile app!
You can find it from the ‘More’ menu in the bottom right hand corner of the mobile app

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
